name: io.github.verygoodplugins/streamdeck-mcp
title: Stream Deck MCP
description: Write Stream Deck desktop profiles with a legacy USB fallback.

tools.name: streamdeck_read_profiles
tools.description: List desktop profiles from ProfilesV3 or ProfilesV2.

tools.name: streamdeck_read_page
tools.description: Read a profile page by index or directory ID.

tools.name: streamdeck_write_page
tools.description: Create or rewrite a Stream Deck desktop page manifest.

tools.name: streamdeck_create_icon
tools.description: Generate a 72x72 PNG icon for a profile button.

tools.name: streamdeck_create_action
tools.description: Create a script-backed Open action block.

tools.name: streamdeck_restart_app
tools.description: Restart the Stream Deck desktop app on macOS.
